title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・立ちはだかる鬼姉

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the curtains close on the spring Tenno Sho!
What a magnificent race!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Super Creek has never run so magnificently!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What the—?! Where did all that strength come
from?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I mean, I was the one who won, but still...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You ran way more intensely than I did... Such
strength!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Is it really you? Are you really the Super Creek I
know?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No, you're not my Super Creek... But I've seen
that look on your face before...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So that's how you managed a race like that...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Whew, that was an impressive race, Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You really are my lifelong rival.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But there are two Tenno Sho races—spring and
autumn. Kyoto and Tokyo. West and east. Cherry
blossoms and autumn leaves.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I, Oguri Cap, shall be your opponent at the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Er, did I mess up? Was that the wrong vibe?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that was good. But don't get all serious on
me outta the blue like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Super Creek managed to get a great
result in her spring race against Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But why does she seem to have gotten over all
that's happened?
